flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Schreiner University rose 43% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.6k → $9.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Schreiner University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.9k → $39.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Schreiner University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.9k → $39.3k).
